ddls:
CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "context_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the context in which the message is processed */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stream in which the message is processed */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the message (higher value indicates higher priority) */,
  "flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating special handling requirements */,
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for message correlation */,
  "message_content" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the message (e.g., pending, processed, failed) */,
  "retry_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the message has been retried */,
  "next_retry_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the next retry attempt */,
  "last_processed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was last processed */,
  "source_system" TEXT /* System or service that generated the message */,
  "destination_system" TEXT /* System or service that the message is intended for */,
  "message_type" TEXT /* Type of message (e.g., event, command, query) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_context_id FOREIGN KEY ("context_id") REFERENCES contexts ("context_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_correlation_id FOREIGN KEY ("correlation_id") REFERENCES correlation_ids ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_flag FOREIGN KEY ("flag") REFERENCES message_flags ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_stream_id FOREIGN KEY ("stream_id") REFERENCES streams ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_priority FOREIGN KEY ("priority") REFERENCES message_priorities ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contexts" (
  "context_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each context */,
  "context_name" TEXT /* Name of the context */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the context */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the context was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the context was last updated */,
  "parent_context_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent context for hierarchical context management */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicate whether the context is active or archived */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the context */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the context */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("context_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contexts_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contexts_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streams" (
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stream */,
  "stream_name" TEXT /* Name of the stream */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stream */,
  "context_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the context in which the stream operates */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stream was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stream was last updated */,
  "parent_stream_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent stream for hierarchical stream management */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicate whether the stream is active or archived */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the stream */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the stream */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streams_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streams_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streams_context_id FOREIGN KEY ("context_id") REFERENCES contexts ("context_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "message_priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority level */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority level */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicate whether the priority level is active or archived */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the priority level */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the priority level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_message_priorities_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_message_priorities_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "message_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag type */,
  "flag_name" TEXT /* Name of the flag type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flag type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicate whether the flag type is active or archived */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the flag type */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the flag type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_message_flags_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_message_flags_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correlation_ids" (
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation ID */,
  "correlation_name" TEXT /* Name of the correlation ID */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the correlation ID */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the correlation ID was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the correlation ID was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicate whether the correlation ID is active or archived */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the correlation ID */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the correlation ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correlation_ids_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correlation_ids_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicate whether the user account is active or deactivated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Track the number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicate whether the role is active or archived */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the role */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access occurred */,
  "message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the message accessed (if applicable) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_message_id FOREIGN KEY ("message_id") REFERENCES messages ("message_id")
)
